name: Tax Court Petition Assessment Stay

eligibility.description: Available to any taxpayer who receives a formal Notice of Deficiency and files a petition within the statutory 90 or 150-day window.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Filing a petition with the Tax Court within 90 days (or 150 if outside the US) of a deficiency notice automatically prohibits the IRS from assessing or collecting the tax until the court's decision is final.
